title: pelargonium × pellitum
intro: Pelargonium × pellitum, also known as Geranium or Cape Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, combining elements of Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium cucullatum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Pelargonium × pellitum include reducing inflammation and stress, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues.
